name: freight dispatchers managing 10–20 deliveries per day tool
description: For freight dispatchers processing 10–20 deliveries per day, inefficient truck loading causes late orders. We optimize loading and generate manifests instead of manual loading processes and spreadsheets.
target_audience: freight dispatchers managing 10–20 deliveries per day
problem_solved: inefficient truck loading leading to delays

locked_fields.primary_problem: inefficient truck loading leading to delays
